Enumeration Case# kSBCModePageCaching_LBCSS_Mask

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.3+

```
kSBCModePageCaching_LBCSS_Mask = (1 << kSBCModePageCaching_LBCSS_Bit)
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/1555560-caching_flags2_bitfields/ksbcmodepagecaching_lbcss_mask#discussion)
